Group1_before.description: HC II/protein ratio before haemodialysis for Group 1 (low HC II). Used together with Group1_after to compute the change. These measurements are from the same patients as Group1_after.

Group1_after.description: HC II/protein ratio after haemodialysis for Group 1 (low HC II). Used together with Group1_before to compute the change. These measurements are from the same patients as Group1_before.

Group2_before.description: HC II/protein ratio before haemodialysis for Group 2 (normal HC II). Used together with Group2_after to compute the change. These measurements are from the same patients as Group2_after.

Group2_after.description: HC II/protein ratio after haemodialysis for Group 2 (normal HC II). Used together with Group2_before to compute the change. These measurements are from the same patients as Group2_before.
